Mayor Byrne's strength is growing
apace as election approaches, and in
addition to the labor vote of the city,
which comes to him through his be-

ness, professional men and men in

cess. The conservative fear a change
in administration lest q tourmoil re-
suit, and do not care to take the risk
of a man going into office who will be
the absolute tool of the Commercial
club of a private corporation, or who
will try to bring about reforms that
will turn Spokane into city of blue
laws.
